case_title: GILLIAN MARY BAZE VS. MAT KIIST DDS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF AMENDING CLAIM TO ADD AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAZE, GILLIAN MARY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAZE, GILLIAN MARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MAT KIISK DDS INC PLEASE SEE ATTACHED. CASE IS DISMISSED AGAINST MAT KIISK, DDS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 (CLAIM AMENDED TO ADD AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT) FILED BY BAZE, GILLIAN MARY AS TO DEFENDANT KIISK DDS, MAT MAT KIISK DDS INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE:$40.00 SERVED JUL-27-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAT KIISK DDS INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BAZE, GILLIAN MARY AS TO DEFENDANT KIISK DDS, MAT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE:$40.00 SERVED JUL-27-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KIISK DDS, MAT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF GILLIAN MARY BAZE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAT KIISK DDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAT KISSK DDS INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MAT KIISK DDS, PRESIDENT. THE COURT DISMISSES WITH PREJUDICE THE CASE AGAINST MAT KIISK DDS AS THE INDIVIDUAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
